scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kharisma/protocol build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter clients-service build && pnpm --filter groups-service build && pnpm --filter kharisma-cli build
scripts.build:ios:app: xcodebuild -project apps/ios/Kharisma.xcodeproj -scheme Kharisma -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @kharisma/protocol test && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter clients-service test && pnpm --filter groups-service test && pnpm --filter kharisma-cli test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @kharisma/protocol build && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter clients-service typecheck && pnpm --filter groups-service typecheck && pnpm --filter kharisma-cli typecheck
